name: Curry Powder#2
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon whole fenugreek seeds,  see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the whole spices in a blender and grind them together.
2. Add the powdered spices to the ground whole spices.
3. Store the mixture in an air-tight container in a dry place.
YIELD: about 1/4 cup
